title: Vectorize REST API
excerpt: **get** `/accounts/{account_id}/vectorize/v2/indexes` - `config: optional IndexDimensionConfiguration` Specifies the number of dimensions for the index - `metric: "cosine" or "euclidean" or "dot-product"` Specifies the type of metric to use calculating distance. Specifies the timestamp the resource was created as an ISO8601 string.
